title: Luffy Wakes Up Furious
description: On pages 5–8, luffy wakes up furious as zoro cuts through the Baroque Works agents at Whiskey Peak while Luffy wakes up and misunderstands the situation.
scene: Luffy Wakes Up Furious. Zoro cuts through the Baroque Works agents at Whiskey Peak while Luffy wakes up and misunderstands the situation. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I see him! He's over there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hahaha, this is as far as you'll get.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't worry about that and just kill him!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What a waste of such fine liquor...

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on luffy wakes up furious. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
